name: Transfer Intent Checkout State
description: Embeddable payment checkout lifecycle: (1) Client creates intent via public API key, (2) Proxy forwards to bank with internal key (CORS-safe), (3) User confirms on checkout URL, (4) Server settles if confirmed. Transitions: PENDING → COMPLETED or EXPIRED/CANCELED. Includes expiryMinutes, successUrl/cancelUrl redirects.
input: { apiKey, amount, denom, description, metadata, successUrl, cancelUrl }
author: Tiranyx
